services.title: Acupuncture Treatments
services.body: Traditional and modern acupuncture techniques for various conditions.

services.title: Herbal Medicine Consultations
services.body: Personalised herbal prescriptions based on TCM principles.

services.title: Cupping Therapy
services.body: Relieves muscle tension and improves blood flow with cupping techniques.

services.title: Safe & Hygienic Practices
services.body: Sterile needles and equipment to ensure your safety during treatments.

services.title: Flexible Appointment Times
services.body: Convenient booking options including early mornings and late evenings.

services.title: Initial Consultation
services.body: Comprehensive health assessment to tailor your treatment plan.

faqs.a: Yes, all our practitioners are registered with the British Acupuncture Council (Bac).
Absolutely. We use sterile needles and follow strict hygiene protocols.
We offer treatments for pain, stress, digestive issues, and more.

faqs.q: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.a: You can call us or use our online booking system to schedule a session.
